prompt: A cinematic Japanese movie poster featuring a romantic, melancholic scene of a man and a woman standing face-to-face on a wet train station platform at night in the rain. The tall man on the left wears a dark coat and backpack, holding a black umbrella over them. The woman on the right wears a tan trench coat, looking up at him. A red and white commuter train with the word Tokyo written in Japanese and English on the front is on the tracks to the right. A station sign on the left indicates the Yamanote Line in Japanese. The lighting is moody with neon city lights reflecting on the wet platform. The poster features prominent text overlays. At the top, a horizontal tagline reads あの日、言えなかった言葉がある。. On the left, a vertical tagline reads あの日、置き去りにした想い 今、ふたりをつなぐ.... In the lower center, the large main title is 最後の切符 in a white serif font, with a red cursive subtitle Saigo no Kippu below it. Below the title are two lines of Japanese cast names, followed by a dense block of small Japanese production credits. At the bottom center, a red website URL and the release text 2025年秋 全国ロードショー. The bottom corners feature two golden award laurels with Japanese text.
